creator: pascal.guitierrez@gmail.com
text:
A bit off topic but I managed to get it working with the samba41 package.

Have you tried with samba version 3.6.23?



> On 1 May 2014, at 15:47, Craig Meinschein <cmeinsch@gmail.com> wrote:
> 
> I'm experiencing this same issue. I can kinit successfully, and after
> running 'net ads join -U craigm' I see that a computer account object
> *is* successfully created in Active Directory. My domain controller is
> running Windows Server 2012 R2. I'm happy to provide any debug
> information I can, if needed.
> 
> Craig
